phasePacks.name: Mobile Fruit Vending
phasePacks.description: A high-frequency mobile retail model providing fresh, chilled, and pre-sliced Jamaican fruits to urban workers and commuters.
phasePacks.whatThisIs: A mobile food vending operation selling fresh, hygienically prepared cut fruits in cups or bags. Targets office workers, students, and pedestrians in busy areas.
whatYouNeed: Cooler with ice packs
Cutting board and sharp knives
Food-grade containers and cups
Disposable forks/toothpicks
Hand sanitizer and gloves
Small folding table or cart
Cash box
Umbrella for shade
firstSevenActions: Scout 3 potential locations (bus stops, plazas, schools)
Visit Coronation Market early morning for wholesale fruit prices
Buy initial fruit stock (pineapple, mango, watermelon, papaya)
Prepare fruit cups at home the night before
Set up at chosen location by 7 AM
Price cups at JMD 200-400 based on size
Collect customer feedback on preferred fruits
waitingTimeTasks: Research food handler permit requirements
Design simple menu board
Find backup fruit suppliers
Calculate profit margins per fruit type
Plan weekly fruit rotation based on season
valueAddMenu: Add condensed milk or honey drizzle (+JMD 50)
phasePacks.salesMode: Cash sales at location. Build regulars through consistent quality and timing. Take pre-orders via WhatsApp for offices.
phasePacks.dailyMinimum: Sell 30 cups at JMD 300 average = JMD 9,000 daily revenue. After costs, expect JMD 4,500-5,500 profit per day.
commonFailurePoints: Poor fruit quality or overripe stock
Not keeping fruit cold in sun
Buying too much stock that spoils
exitExpandPaths: Add second location with helper
Expand to juice bar
Supply fruits to restaurants
Franchise the concept
Add healthy snacks line

packLadder.reason: Scale from fruit vending to juice production or expand into full catering services

phasePacks.name: Basic Website Creation
phasePacks.description: Build simple websites for small businesses using no-code tools. High demand, low overhead, scalable.
phasePacks.whatThisIs: A web design service creating professional websites for small businesses using platforms like Wix, Squarespace, WordPress, Google AI Studio, or Bolt.new — no advanced coding required.
whatYouNeed: Laptop with reliable internet
Wix / Squarespace / WordPress account
Google AI Studio (free — AI-assisted site building)
Bolt.new (free — AI generates full sites from prompts)
Canva for graphics
Portfolio website (your own)
Contract template
Invoice system
firstSevenActions: Try Bolt.new — type a business description and generate a full site in minutes
Explore Google AI Studio for AI-assisted design and content generation
Complete platform tutorials (Wix or Squarespace) as your fallback
Build your own portfolio website using whichever tool you prefer
Create 2 demo sites for different industries
Document your process and packages
Price services (JMD 25,000-60,000 per site)
Reach out to 10 local businesses without websites
Offer first client a discount for testimonial
waitingTimeTasks: Learn SEO basics
Practice Bolt.new prompts for different business types
Explore what Google AI Studio can generate for layout and copy
Study successful small business websites
Create website questionnaire for clients
Build template library
Get platform certifications
phasePacks.salesMode: Direct outreach to businesses, referrals, social media presence. Target businesses you personally patronize.
phasePacks.dailyMinimum: Complete 2 websites per month at JMD 40,000 average = JMD 80,000 monthly. Scale with maintenance contracts.
commonFailurePoints: Not getting content from clients on time
exitExpandPaths: Learn coding for custom development
Build agency with team
Create website templates for sale
Offer digital marketing services
Specialize in specific industry

packLadder.reason: Add social media management services or create digital products to sell alongside websites

phasePacks.name: Cluster Lash Application (Service)
phasePacks.description: Mobile cluster lash application service eliminating salon travel and waiting time for clients in Jamaica. Provides fast lash enhancement with on-location convenience. Now includes complete operational documentation, enhanced 14-lens structure, and Jamaica-specific forms and templates.

packLadder.reason: Natural progression from mobile beauty to full beauty services or expand to beauty product sales

firstSevenActions: Research the local competition in your parish and identify a gap.
Create your business name and secure social media handles.
Source your initial supplies from local wholesalers or online.
Set up a WhatsApp Business catalog with clear JMD pricing.
Create 3-5 piece of sample work/products and photograph them well.
Announce your launch to immediate friends and family to get first clients.
Post your first piece of content on social media with local hashtags.
waitingTimeTasks: Draft templates for customer inquiries and FAQs.
Research advanced techniques or trends on YouTube.
Build a list of 20 potential B2B or high-value clients.
Design basic branding (logo, business cards) on Canva.
phasePacks.dailyMinimum: To sustain Cluster Lash Application (Service), aim for at least 2-3 transactions per day or 1 high-ticket client per week, ensuring daily gross revenue exceeds JMD 5,000.
commonFailurePoints: Undercutting prices and working at a loss.
exitExpandPaths: Hire an assistant to handle basic tasks.
Expand product/service line.
Open a physical storefront or dedicated studio.
Transition to teaching or consulting others in the field.
whatYouNeed: Smartphone with good camera and WhatsApp Business
Basic toolkit or equipment specific to your trade
Initial inventory or supplies (JMD 10,000 - 20,000 worth)
Branded social media presence (Instagram/TikTok)
Reliable transportation or delivery partner (e.g., local bearer)
Notebook for tracking income and expenses
valueAddMenu: Monthly Retainer or Subscription package (15% discount)
phasePacks.whatThisIs: A robust Jamaican beauty business focused on Cluster Lash Application (Service). Designed for high margins and low overhead in the local market.
phasePacks.whatThisIsNot: Not a franchise. Not a get-rich-quick scheme. Requires consistent effort and excellent customer service.
phasePacks.salesMode: Highly visual social media marketing on Instagram and TikTok, driving traffic to WhatsApp Business for closing sales and taking deposits.

phasePacks.name: Resale of cluster lash products (lashes, adhesive, tools) for the Jamaican market — low startup capital, repeatable sales, and minimal skill requirement.
phasePacks.description: Resale of cluster lash products (lashes, adhesive, tools) for the Jamaican market — low startup capital, repeatable sales, and minimal skill requirement.
phasePacks.whatThisIs: A robust Jamaican beauty business focused on Resale of cluster lash products (lashes, adhesive, tools) for the Jamaican market — low startup capital, repeatable sales, and minimal skill requirement.. Designed for high margins and low overhead in the local market.
phasePacks.whatThisIsNot: Not a franchise. Not a get-rich-quick scheme. Requires consistent effort and excellent customer service.
warnings: Requires inventory management
Competitive market
Import duties apply
because: Low startup capital
Repeatable sales model
Growing beauty market in Jamaica

phasePacks.name: Personal Fitness Training (Mobile)
phasePacks.description: A mobile personal training business serving clients at home, in parks, or at their workplace. Recurring session-based income with zero rent overhead.
phasePacks.whatThisIs: You go to the client. No gym needed. Offer structured fitness sessions — weight loss, strength, flexibility — to individuals or small groups. Build a recurring client base that pays weekly or monthly.
whatYouNeed: Fitness certification or proven training experience
Resistance bands and basic portable equipment
Measuring tape and weight scale
Client intake forms
WhatsApp Business for scheduling
Professional workout gear
Session tracking notebook or app
firstSevenActions: Define your niche — weight loss, strength, postnatal, seniors
Offer 3 free trial sessions to build testimonials
Set session rates (JMD 2,500-5,000 per session or monthly packages)
Create a simple before/after tracking template for clients
Post your services in community WhatsApp groups and Facebook
Map out 3 nearby parks or open spaces for outdoor sessions
Design a 4-week starter programme for new clients
waitingTimeTasks: Study nutrition basics to add value beyond just exercise
Research group session pricing vs 1-on-1
Design a referral discount system
Create a monthly transformation challenge concept
Research fitness certification options (NCSF, ACE online)
starterFolderContents: Client intake and health assessment form
valueAddMenu: Online check-in and accountability WhatsApp support
phasePacks.salesMode: Referral-driven. Start with your network — friends, family, church, community. Every client who gets a result refers two more. Instagram before/after posts are your strongest marketing asset.
phasePacks.dailyMinimum: 3 sessions per day at JMD 3,000 each = JMD 9,000 daily. Monthly package clients (8 sessions) at JMD 18,000 = stable recurring income.
commonFailurePoints: Undercharging out of fear — price your value
Taking every client — niche down first
Skipping the intake form — liability risk
Burning out from too many 1-on-1s without packages
exitExpandPaths: Run group bootcamp sessions (5-10 people, same time block)
Launch a 30-day transformation challenge online
Partner with a nutritionist for bundled packages
Open a small outdoor training space
Build a YouTube/Instagram fitness brand

packLadder.reason: Scale from mobile training to event wellness services or tourism fitness experiences
